rationale: In the citing paper, Ansari and Mela (2003) appears only in a grouped literature citation listing prior marketing studies that used Dirichlet process priors for static heterogeneity. The paper does not discuss this cited work's specific findings, model components, or empirical setting beyond that broad background point. There is no distinct methodological borrowing or direct conceptual dependence on this specific article in the development of the GPDH framework.
